$comment: v0 additions closing the 8 gaps flagged in docs/TOKENS.md §Gaps. Overrides are minimal — everything here is an addition on top of base.json unless explicitly renaming. Dark-mode inversions are exposed under color.surface.dark.* and consumed by the css platform's [data-theme='dark'] selector.

dark.$comment: Gap 1 — dark-mode surface inversions. Strategy: option 1 from README (light stroke on dark ground) for functional UI; option 2 (dark ink on light paper) is for hand-drawn assets and is not tokenized here (asset-level concern).

card.comment: Dark counterpart to surface.card (#424242) — lighter than page so cards read as elevated

on-light.comment: In dark mode this maps to text-on-dark-surface

muted.comment: Muted stays high enough contrast on dark page

primary-50.comment: Gap 2 — semantic ramps for brand.primary (amber). Derived via HSL lightness steps from #ffb300 (H=42°, S=100%).

primary-900.comment: Equals color.brand.primary-hover; keeps existing hover semantics

chart.$comment: Gap 3 — 10-color categorical chart palette. Base is the Okabe-Ito color-blind-safe set (7 colors) extended with brand amber + two neutrals for continuity with the design language. Contrast between adjacent pairs >= 3:1 sRGB (WCAG AA non-text). Use in Chart.js via chart.data.datasets[i].backgroundColor.

series-8.comment: Okabe-Ito orange (distinct from brand amber under color-blind simulation)

series-10.comment: Brand accent (soft blue) — for continuity with links

warning.comment: Gap 8 — amber-orange warning, distinct from brand.primary (#ffb300) so warning is unambiguously alarming rather than branded

focus-ring.$comment: Gap 8 — focus-ring color + width. WCAG 2.4.7 focus-visible target; contrast ratio vs both light and dark surfaces >= 3:1.

color.comment: Blue-500-ish; brighter than accent-300 for high visibility

mono.comment: Gap 7 — mono stack extracted from ad-hoc usage in admin/system-health views

motion.$comment: Gap 4 — motion primitives. Durations already live in transition.* (base.json); ease curves are added here and prefers-reduced-motion is handled at consumer level (no dedicated token — see tokens/README.md).

breakpoint.$comment: Gap 5 — breakpoint tokens. Mobile-first — treat as min-widths.

z-index.$comment: Gap 6 — z-index scale. Replaces magic numbers 1000/1001 currently in the sidebar (aspirant-client/src/components/*Sidebar*).

focus.comment: 2px solid ring around focus target — pairs with color.focus-ring.width + offset
